examples: He has been a meticulous manager, a manager par excellence.
Her talent was not in gathering information but in analyzing and assessing, a meticulous organizer who plotted and planned with the cunning of a leopard.
He was so meticulous about everything.
Or should professionals be meticulous before publishing their thoughts on public forums like Twitter?
The control buttons for the COMAND system have also been crafted with meticulous technical precision.
